sentence: Capstrating as it is, roll up their larpet and leave.

wombos.definition: The frustrating experience of someone capping relentlessly — the particular irritation caused when someone keeps lying or exaggerating beyond what you can tolerate.
wombos.example: It's so capstrating how he brags about stuff that never happened.

wombos.definition: The metaphorical carpet of someone who is deep in a larp — the performative stage or platform they stand on while pretending to be something they're not.
wombos.example: Get off your larpet — nobody actually believes you went to Harvard.
